mapper.select: SELECT fs.id, fs.supplier_id as "supplierId", ds.seller_name as "supplierName", ds.seller_tier as "supplierTier", fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.order_amount as "orderAmount", fs.commission_amount as "commissionAmount", fs.platform_fee as "platformFee", fs.net_amount as "netAmount", fs.currency, fs.settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", fs.settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", fs.disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference", fs.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_settlements fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fs.supplier_id = ds.seller_id WHERE fs.id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.fact_settlements GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT fs.id, fs.supplier_id as "supplierId", ds.seller_name as "supplierName", fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.order_amount as "orderAmount", fs.commission_amount as "commissionAmount", fs.platform_fee as "platformFee", fs.net_amount as "netAmount", fs.currency, fs.settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", fs.settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", fs.disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference", fs.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_settlements fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fs.supplier_id = ds.seller_id WHERE fs.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND fs.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT fs.id, fs.supplier_id as "supplierId", ds.seller_name as "supplierName", fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.order_amount as "orderAmount", fs.net_amount as "netAmount", fs.currency, fs.settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", fs.settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", fs.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_settlements fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fs.supplier_id = ds.seller_id WHERE fs.state_id IN ('PENDING', 'CALCULATING', 'CALCULATED', 'APPROVED') AND fs.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT fs.id, fs.supplier_id as "supplierId", ds.seller_name as "supplierName", fs.order_id as "orderId", fs.state_id as "stateId", fs.flow_id as "flowId", fs.order_amount as "orderAmount", fs.commission_amount as "commissionAmount", fs.platform_fee as "platformFee", fs.net_amount as "netAmount", fs.currency, fs.settlement_period_start as "settlementPeriodStart", fs.settlement_period_end as "settlementPeriodEnd", fs.disbursement_reference as "disbursementReference", fs.created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.fact_settlements fs LEFT JOIN hm_query.dim_seller ds ON fs.supplier_id = ds.seller_id WHERE fs.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND fs.state_id = #{stateId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
